After registering, log in and focus on the application form—specifically, the personal details, qualifications, and selection of the position. paragraphs: UPSSSC Agriculture Technical Assistant Recruitment 2026: Uttar Pradesh Subordinate Service Selection Commission (UPSSSC) has issued a notification for the position of Agriculture Technical Assistant. The recruitment drive comprises 2759 vacancies. All eligible and interested candidates are advised to carefully read the official notification and apply before 11-06-2026, the last Date. All relevant information regarding the UPSSSC Agriculture Technical Assistant Recruitment 2026 is provided below.
